title: taraxacum kimuranum
intro: Taraxacum kimuranum, also known as the Korean dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum kimuranum include its ability to act as a diuretic, which helps to remove excess fluids from the body, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum kimuranum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum kimuranum include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
